title: Simulatrix Revival
description: An addon for Gravestone:Herotime that revives the Simulatrix from the 1.12.2 era
body:
This mod is an addon to the well known mod called Gravestone:Herotime, this addon aims to revive an old custom omnitrix of mine that appeared breifely back in 1.12.2 for the lucraft core mod. (For lore reasons) The Simulatrix is, in essence, just an omnitrix but it's glitched causing choas and mayhem but also does a lot of good.

The rought lore draft:

Azmuth prime created a simulated copy of his universe to digitally preserve all life forms in case the omnitrix failed, however the simulated Azmuth was made too smart for his own good causing him to realise he was in a simulation. Upon learning this he created a way to manipulate the simulated universe condensing a copy of it into an omnitrix of his own but it was too unstable making the simulatrix glitch beyond repair. Simulated Azmuth tried to destroy the simulatrix to no avail causing even worse glitches, at this point Azmuth was distraught worried about the consequences of his creation. Simulated Azmuth later blasted the simulatrix into the far reaches of his universe thinking it’ll never be found, however it landed on earth where a human child no older than 10 discovered it.


It is recommended to use JEI for the recipes!!!

Huge thanks to Deaded and Fsang for their help in developing this addon
